description_long: This is a modern, three-seater sofa with a sleek, minimalist design and a dark, solid color upholstery. The sofa features three individual seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all of which are uniform in size and appear to be attached. The armrests are gently curved, medium in height, and seamlessly integrated into the sofa's frame, providing a smooth transition from the backrest to the seat. The legs are short, cylindrical, and metallic, positioned at each corner for stable support and a contemporary look. The upholstery is smooth and untextured, giving the sofa a clean, polished appearance suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or modern outdoor lounges.
description: A sleek, dark-colored three-seater sofa with smooth upholstery, curved armrests, and metallic legs, designed in a minimalist modern style.
description_view_0: Front view showing three uniform seat and back cushions, curved armrests, and the full width of the sofa.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the medium-height, curved armrest and the sofa's depth.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, unadorned backrest and the sofa's clean lines.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and depth seen in view 1.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three individual, uniform seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all attached and evenly spaced.
attribute_armrest_style: Curved, medium-height armrests integrated into the sofa frame, with a smooth, padded profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, cylindrical metallic legs positioned at each corner, exposed and providing a modern, stable base.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest with three attached, uniform cushions and no visible tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid, dark-colored upholstery with a smooth, untextured surface and no visible patterns or decorative stitching.
